description: Geopolitical events impacting pharmaceutical supply chains, 1995-2025

events.label: Asian Financial Crisis
events.detail: Currency collapse across SE Asia disrupts API exports

events.label: India Nuclear Tests / Sanctions
events.detail: US sanctions on India briefly threaten pharma trade

events.label: 9/11 Attacks
events.detail: US port shutdowns delay API and finished-drug imports

events.label: Iraq War Begins
events.detail: Oil price surge raises freight and feedstock costs

events.label: SARS Outbreak
events.detail: Chinese API factories shuttered during containment

events.label: Hurricane Katrina
events.detail: Gulf Coast pharma manufacturing knocked offline

events.label: Lehman Brothers Collapse
events.detail: Credit freeze stalls pharma procurement pipelines

events.label: Heparin Contamination Crisis
events.detail: Contaminated Chinese heparin kills 81 in US

events.label: Fukushima Earthquake/Tsunami
events.detail: Japan pharma plants destroyed; global API shortage

events.label: Ranbaxy FDA Ban
events.detail: India's largest generics maker banned from US market

events.label: Russia Annexes Crimea
events.detail: EU/US sanctions disrupt Eastern European API flows

events.label: Tianjin Port Explosion
events.detail: Major chemical/pharma logistics hub destroyed

events.label: Brexit Vote
events.detail: UK-EU regulatory divergence uncertainty begins

events.label: Hurricane Maria
events.detail: Puerto Rico pharma plants (Baxter, Amgen) devastated

events.label: US-China Trade War Begins
events.detail: Tariffs on Chinese API intermediates; 25% duties

events.label: Valsartan NDMA Contamination
events.detail: Carcinogen found in Chinese-made API; global recall

events.label: COVID-19 Pandemic
events.detail: Wuhan lockdown halts global API production

events.label: India API Export Ban
events.detail: India restricts export of 26 APIs and formulations

events.label: Suez Canal Blockage
events.detail: Ever Given blocks API shipments for 6 days

events.label: Russia-Ukraine War
events.detail: Neon gas shortage threatens pharma packaging supply

events.label: Shanghai Lockdown
events.detail: Two-month lockdown disrupts Chinese API/excipient exports

events.label: Turkey Earthquake
events.detail: Pharma warehouses destroyed; regional shortage

events.label: Red Sea / Houthi Attacks
events.detail: Shipping rerouted around Africa; transit +10 days

events.label: US-China Biotech Restrictions
events.detail: BIOSECURE Act limits Chinese CDMO partnerships
